_meta.description: D6 fixtures for google-adk / gen-ui-declarative (A2UI Dynamic Schema)
_meta._note: Agent plays a sales analyst for the fictional Vantage Threads company (OSS-136). Two-stage A2UI pattern: (1) outer agent has only one tool, `generate_a2ui` (no args); (2) `generate_a2ui` internally invokes a secondary LLM with tool_choice forced on the design tool, which emits the flat A2UI components payload; (3) after the tool returns, the outer agent emits a one-sentence narration. Fixtures cover three LLM calls per pill: (a) outer turn 1 -> generate_a2ui toolcall; (b) inner secondary call -> design toolcall (discriminated by toolName because the user prompt is identical across outer+inner calls); (c) outer turn 2 (matched by toolCallId) -> narration. Pill prompts are natural business questions; chart steering lives in the system prompt + sales-context.ts context entries. Keep userMessage matchers in sync with declarative-gen-ui/suggestions.ts and harness d5-gen-ui-declarative.ts.
_meta._source: captured from live gpt-5.4 responses via langgraph dev threads API (OSS-136 prompt iteration), catalogId injected for the replay path

fixtures._comment: pill sales-dashboard hero — inner secondary LLM (tool_choice forced) emits the flat A2UI components. Discriminated by toolName so it wins over the outer generate_a2ui fixture whose userMessage matches the same prompt.

toolCalls.name: render_a2ui
toolCalls.arguments: {"surfaceId":"sales-dashboard","catalogId":"declarative-gen-ui-catalog","components":[{"id":"root","component":"Card","title":"Q2 Sales Dashboard","subtitle":"Quarterly snapshot for Vantage Threads","child":"dashboard-content"},{"id":"dashboard-content","component":"Column","gap":16,"children":["metrics-row","charts-row"]},{"id":"metrics-row","component":"Row","gap":16,"children":["metric-revenue","metric-customers","metric-winrate","metric-dealsize"]},{"id":"metric-revenue","component":"Metric","label":"Quarterly Revenue","value":"$4.2M","trend":"up","trendValue":"+12% QoQ","weight":1},{"id":"metric-customers","component":"Metric","label":"New Customers","value":"186","trend":"up","trendValue":"+8% QoQ","weight":1},{"id":"metric-winrate","component":"Metric","label":"Win Rate","value":"31%","trend":"down","trendValue":"-2 pts QoQ","weight":1},{"id":"metric-dealsize","component":"Metric","label":"Avg Deal Size","value":"$22.6k","trend":"up","trendValue":"+5% QoQ","weight":1},{"id":"charts-row","component":"Row","gap":16,"children":["region-pie","monthly-bar"]},{"id":"region-pie","component":"PieChart","title":"Revenue by Region","description":"Q2 revenue mix across geographies","data":[{"label":"North America","value":1900000},{"label":"EMEA","value":1300000},{"label":"APAC","value":720000},{"label":"LATAM","value":280000}],"weight":1},{"id":"monthly-bar","component":"BarChart","title":"Monthly Revenue","description":"Revenue trend across the last six months","data":[{"label":"Jan","value":1210000},{"label":"Feb","value":1340000},{"label":"Mar","value":1650000},{"label":"Apr","value":1380000},{"label":"May","value":1420000},{"label":"Jun","value":1400000}],"weight":1}]}

fixtures._comment: pill sales-dashboard hero — outer agent narration after generate_a2ui returns.
pill sales-dashboard hero — outer agent emits generate_a2ui (no args).

toolCalls.arguments: {"surfaceId":"sales-dashboard","catalogId":"declarative-gen-ui-catalog","components":[{"id":"root","component":"Column","gap":16,"children":["risk-card-1","risk-card-2","risk-card-3"]},{"id":"risk-card-1","component":"Card","title":"Northwind Retail","subtitle":"Renewal risk","child":"risk-card-1-content"},{"id":"risk-card-1-content","component":"Column","gap":8,"children":["risk-badge-1","risk-text-1"]},{"id":"risk-badge-1","component":"StatusBadge","text":"Warning \u00b7 $340k renewal","variant":"warning"},{"id":"risk-text-1","component":"Text","text":"No contact for 6 weeks, creating elevated renewal risk this quarter.","variant":"body"},{"id":"risk-card-2","component":"Card","title":"Cascadia Outfitters","subtitle":"Champion departure","child":"risk-card-2-content"},{"id":"risk-card-2-content","component":"Column","gap":8,"children":["risk-badge-2","risk-text-2"]},{"id":"risk-badge-2","component":"StatusBadge","text":"Error \u00b7 $180k at risk","variant":"error"},{"id":"risk-text-2","component":"Text","text":"Primary champion left the account, increasing execution risk on the deal.","variant":"body"},{"id":"risk-card-3","component":"Card","title":"Atlas Goods","subtitle":"Legal stall","child":"risk-card-3-content"},{"id":"risk-card-3-content","component":"Column","gap":8,"children":["risk-badge-3","risk-text-3"]},{"id":"risk-badge-3","component":"StatusBadge","text":"Warning \u00b7 $95k at risk","variant":"warning"},{"id":"risk-text-3","component":"Text","text":"Deal is stalled in legal review, which may delay close timing this quarter.","variant":"body"}]}
